occurrence_sentence: AVaQus is the first European-funded large-scale project on quantum annealing and it will lead to the consolidation of quantum annealing hardware as a research field in Europe, and potentially as a future European quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: acting as the coordinator of AVaQus
occurrence_sentence: * Institut de Física d'Altes Energies (IFAE), Barcelona (Spain), acting as the coordinator of AVaQus.

AVaQus is the first European-funded large-scale project on quantum annealing and it will lead to the consolidation of quantum annealing hardware as a research field in Europe, and potentially as a future European quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: assembling the components designed and developed by the partners
occurrence_sentence: IFAE will operate as one of the two integration nodes together with KIT, assembling the components designed and developed by the partners CNRS, UG and DELFT.
